notes: Clusters of atoms that share a recurring motif/phrase and therefore must translate that shared element identically. Derived from real corpus reading, not filename pattern-matching alone.

clusters.note: All 30 SCENE variants (v01-v30) run the same sustained computing metaphor for rumination (CPU, threads, background process, the loop, full core). Confirmed by direct read 2026-07-22. Every variant must render 'the loop' as 循环/思维循环 consistently; see concept_map.json.

All 20 STORY variants (v01-v20) are character studies tracking an IDENTITY_STAGE progression (pre_awareness -> destabilization -> experimentation -> self_claim) through 4 recurring motif phrases plus recurring workplace-noun scene furniture (quarterly review, KPI, stakeholders, direct reports, deliverable, slide deck, inbox, calendar). All 4 motifs must resolve to their single locked zh-CN rendering across every variant regardless of IDENTITY_STAGE.

All 6 EXERCISE variants (v01-v06) instruct the reader to say a specific line aloud ('I agreed because I feared the cost.', 'This is a people-pleasing choice.', 'I edited myself.'). Each must be rendered as a natural sayable Mandarin sentence, tested by reading aloud, per style_guide_zh_cn.yaml.

All 4 sampled PIVOT variants use the 'Notice X, then Y' imperative reframe structure with an invisible-logistics-load motif. Keep the imperative economy (see style_guide_zh_cn.yaml PIVOT opener rule).

Confirmed by full-file read 2026-07-22: roughly half the variant slots (RECOGNITION v02/v04, MECHANISM_PROOF v01/v03/v05, TURNING_POINT v02/v04, EMBODIMENT v01/v03/v05) appear only as a bare inline text label immediately after the previous variant's body — no '## ' header, no frontmatter, no delimited body of their own. These are stub markers, not real content. Flag this file for a structural-integrity fix before translation; do not translate around the gap or invent body text for the missing slots during translation.

known_gaps: This is a 5-cluster first pass from the same targeted sample used for concept_map.json, not a full-corpus duplicate-detection sweep. A programmatic near-duplicate detector (e.g. shingled n-gram overlap across all 5328 English source files) should run in a later pass to find clusters outside the 5 personas sampled here.
